examples: The torrent, swollen by the melting snow, plunges into a tremendous abyss.
She saw him running to a dangerous abyss on the side.
The country is stepping back from the edge of an abyss.
This is a question Greece is facing as its people stare into the abyss.
One speeds while the other preens about caution, but the bus veers relentlessly towards an abyss.
